setup_task.sh line 16 and export_result.sh line 49 verify this path
task.json description and export_result.sh line 61 checks for this name

privileged_info_summary: Task uses synthetically generated S809 airfoil data (54 coordinate points) embedded directly in setup_task.sh, not sourced from external files or URLs. The data is formatted as a corrupted CSV with Index,X_Pos,Y_Pos,Z_Pos,Notes columns, and the agent must convert it to Selig format (whitespace-separated coordinates without commas). The expected input file is /home/ga/Documents/incoming/project_falcon_foil.csv and output project is /home/ga/Documents/projects/falcon_design.wpa. The task verifier requires the cleaned file to have >20 lines without commas and the project file to contain the airfoil name 'Project_Falcon_Foil' or characteristic coordinate values like '0.99639'. CONTRADICTION: Metadata claims minimum 60 coordinate points, but actual data has only 54 points.
